summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of ZRAI Ultimate Intelligence Engine. All core API integrations working correctly with 81.2% test success rate.

minor_bugs.issue: Email extraction regex not matching test pattern correctly
minor_bugs.impact: Contact extraction may miss some email formats

minor_bugs.issue: Low quality lead threshold may need adjustment (scored 50 instead of <40)
minor_bugs.impact: Some low quality leads may get higher scores than expected

minor_bugs.issue: Some leads getting generic AI reasoning instead of personalized analysis
minor_bugs.impact: Outreach content may be less effective for some leads

working_apis.details: Both text and JSON generation working correctly
Successfully scraping websites and extracting content

passed_tests: ✅ Apify API discovers businesses successfully (found 3 dental clinics in Mumbai)
✅ OpenRouter LLM generates AI reasoning and analysis
✅ Firecrawl API scrapes websites and extracts content
✅ Revenue calculations produce accurate values (₹21K-₹32K monthly loss estimates)
✅ Lead scoring produces valid scores (40-85 range)
✅ Output files created successfully (report.json, leads.json, hot_leads.json, outreach.csv)
✅ Outreach content generated (email, WhatsApp, call scripts)
✅ JSON output structure is complete and valid
✅ End-to-end integration test successful (processed 2 Delhi dental clinics)
✅ Revenue accuracy validated (reasonable values, recoverable < total loss)
action_item_for_main_agent: Three minor issues identified: 1) Fine-tune email extraction regex patterns, 2) Adjust low-quality lead scoring threshold, 3) Improve AI reasoning personalization. All core functionality working correctly.

success_percentage.data_quality: 85% (minor issues with contact extraction and AI reasoning)
